mappings.reason: Ibex does not expose internal exception flag registers (e.g., ExcpFlag) as available signals. The controller handles exceptions internally without flag register outputs.
Ibex does not expose mtval CSR write data as an available signal. csr_mtval_o is the final output, not the write data to the CSR.
Ibex does not expose mcause CSR write data as an available signal. exc_cause_o provides the exception cause but not the full mcause register write value.
Ibex does not expose mstatus CSR fields (mpp, mie, mpie) as available signals. These are internal CSR registers not visible at the controller boundary.
Ibex does not expose mstatus CSR fields (mpp, mie, mpie) as available signals. These are internal CSR registers not visible at the controller boundary.
Ibex does not expose mstatus CSR fields (mpp, mie, mpie) as available signals. These are internal CSR registers not visible at the controller boundary.
Ibex does not expose mepc CSR write data as an available signal. The controller does not output the mepc value being written.
Ibex does not expose mstatus CSR fields (mprv, mpp) as available signals. These are internal CSR registers not visible at the controller boundary.
Ibex does not expose mstatus CSR fields (mpie) as available signals. These are internal CSR registers not visible at the controller boundary.
Ibex does not expose mstatus CSR fields (mie, mpie) as available signals. These are internal CSR registers not visible at the controller boundary.
Ibex does not expose an explicit 'exception handler started' signal. The controller handles exceptions internally without a dedicated output flag.
Ibex does not expose an explicit 'exception handler started' signal. The controller handles exceptions internally without a dedicated output flag.
Ibex does not expose interrupt_counter, InstPC (PC from WB stage), or InterruptTrapEntry as available signals. pc_set_o and pc_mux_o indicate PC changes but not the target address value.
Ibex does not expose IntCause (interrupt cause register), IntTaken (interrupt taken flag), or MstatusMIE as available signals. irq_pending_i and csr_mstatus_mie_i are inputs, not internal state.
Ibex does not expose IntBrReq (interrupt branch request) or mcause interrupt bit write data as available signals. exc_cause_o provides cause but not the interrupt flag bit.
Ibex does not expose IntBrReq, mepc write data, or InstPC (PC from WB stage) as available signals. pc_id_i is the ID stage PC, not the WB stage PC.
Ibex is a RV32IMC core without floating-point support. No frm CSR or floating-point rounding mode signals exist in the available signal list.
